body.u: For a time it seemed I wouldn’t get a job and I kept trying to convince myself that I would get one. I had managed to get one. When I did it was a huge refleferelief of tentiontension for me as it had been worringworrying me for about two years. It seemed as if my life would never end as it Boringly dragged on for thousethose first 5 years when I was doing my electrical Apprenticeshipeapprenticeship I became qualified and worked in Britain for 2 years and then moved back to Australia (where I came from) and worked in a friend, firm who makes Electrical light fittings.
